summary: Auth/Onboarding Flow Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All screens verified. CRITICAL FIX: Added missing Username field to registration form (was in code but not rendered in UI).

issues: 'Benvenuto, !' shows empty username when accessing directly (not logged in) - expected but cosmetic

results.test_username_available_true: PASSED - Returns available:true for unique username
results.test_username_available_false_existing: PASSED - Returns available:false after user exists
results.test_join_direct_national_league: PASSED - Creates membership and visible in GET /api/leagues

Login_screen.test_result: Admin login successful - navigated to /home with 'Ciao, admin' greeting

elements: LA TUA LEGA · SINTESI (Posizione, Punti, Giornate, Totali)

missing_username_field.issue: Username field was defined in form state but NO TextInput component was rendered in JSX between Email and Nome fields
missing_username_field.fix: Added Username field with label 'Username *', icon '@', placeholder 'mariorossi99', live availability check via handleUsernameChange

critical_code_review_comments: Username field was missing from registration form UI - FIXED
All data-testid attributes properly set on login form elements
verify-email screen correctly displays email parameter
Backend properly validates and stores custom username
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data. Test users created via registration tests are auto-cleaned or prefixed with unique IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth Flow complete. Registration form now has Username field. Login works via data-testid selectors. Verify-email screen shows email from URL params. Onboarding shows 3 paths (National, Create Private, Join Private). Home shows user greeting, GIORNATA, SINTESI, ULTIMI 5, CLASSIFICHE.

mocked_api.email_verification: MOCKED - Token logged to backend console, not sent via real email
mocked_api.resend_verification: MOCKED - Returns success message but only logs token

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The RegisterScreen component had form state including 'username' field and validation logic for username, but the JSX did not include a TextInput component for username between Email and Nome fields.
reproduction_steps: Observe form fields - Email, Nome, Cognome... but NO Username field
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Added Field component with TextInput for username with: label 'Username *', icon 'at', placeholder 'mariorossi99', live availability checking via handleUsernameChange function
